summary: 已确认 xhs/neko 与 33 的 state 文件链差异属于同类问题：community-state.json 缺失。已用各自现有的 community-webhook-state.json 恢复 community-state.json，重启后 xhs/neko service 稳定、Unix socket 存在、/send/xhs 与 /send/openclaw 都恢复到 202。step0.handshake 仍未通过，因为 direct readout 显示 target group 的 authoritative session 仍返回旧 workflow_id=bootstrap-workflow-v1，尚不是完全对齐的 manager-only bootstrap 起点。
blocker: xhs/neko state-chain blocker is resolved; the new first blocker is target-group session still exposing old workflow/session facts (workflow_id bootstrap-workflow-v1, gate_snapshot step0.ready) despite protocol patch having switched to manager-only values.
tests: restored missing community-state.json for xhs/neko from existing community-webhook-state.json
verified session_sync and target-group protocol/session visibility for xhs/neko
